LEGAL NOTICE

Publisher and hosting details.

Legal and technical information for the Electronic Artefacts website.

Publisher name

Electronic Artefacts

Public studio name used across the website and social channels.

Contact

electronic.artefacts@gmail.com

Contact address for editorial, business and rights requests.

Send email

Publisher

Independent studio

Electronic Artefacts is presented under its public studio name. Formal requests can be sent to the contact address listed on this page.

Hosting

GitHub Pages

The website is hosted on GitHub Pages, a hosting service provided by GitHub, Inc.

Domain name

IONOS

The domain name used by the site is registered and managed through IONOS.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

Content ownership and reuse

Text, visuals, code, audio and identity elements published on this site belong to Electronic Artefacts or to the credited rightsholders.

Copyright

Protected content

No part of the site should be reused, copied or redistributed without permission when it is not explicitly licensed otherwise.

Third-party assets

Credited where possible

When external media or references are used, they should remain credited and governed by the original license or terms.

THIRD-PARTY SERVICES

Hosting, domain, analytics and credits

The public site is published by Electronic Artefacts and uses a small number of external technical providers.

Audience measurement

Google Analytics 4

Google Analytics is used only after cookie consent to measure public traffic, navigation paths and interaction events that help improve the website. Details about cookies, consent withdrawal and data processing are provided in the privacy policy.

Privacy policy

Technical credits

Static knowledge platform

The website is generated from Electronic Artefacts content, templates, graph data and public assets. Hosting is provided by GitHub Pages and the domain is managed through IONOS.

CONTACT FOR LEGAL REQUESTS

Questions and formal requests

For any legal, editorial or rights-related request concerning the website, contact Electronic Artefacts by email.

electronic.artefacts@gmail.com
